violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in the food storage area
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Interiors of drawers and cupboards not properly sealed.

FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Breakfast gravy noted not being held at 140 degrees fahrenheit or above. Discarded upon request. Also any unused waffle batter in dispenser must be discarded after the breakfast service and cannot be refrigerated and re-used
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Interiors of cabinets and drawers in the breakfast area not properly sealed.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Refrigerators and freezers in the food storage room noted with no thermometers.
